title: Aurora, 13551, Palm Pals Twilight Black Cat 5In, Soft Toy, Black
features: Introducing Palm Pals Twilight Black Cat, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Twilight Cat is a black-coloured cute and cuddly cat soft toy which is filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Twilight Cat is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Twilight Black Cat soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Seasonal collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Twilight Black Cat measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for Halloween, a birthday or as a general gift. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable black cat which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
